title: senecio filiferus
intro: Senecio filiferus, also known as Woolly Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Senecio filiferus include its potential use as a purgative, and it contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, Senecio filiferus is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although caution should be exercised due to the potential toxicity of its pyrrolizidine alkaloids.
